untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identifying 'multiple consecutive inside bars' and 'inside bar sequence range width' for profit targets. No allowed indicator directly quantifies consecutive inside bar patterns or their aggregated range. body_pct < 0.5 approximates single inside bar detection, but the multi-bar sequence logic and range-based profit target thresholds cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Used body_pct < 0.5 to approximate inside bar detection (small body relative to range). Used dc_upper/dc_lower as breakout thresholds. Volume confirmation uses sma_20 as the MA baseline. Reversal exits use opposite donchian levels. Thresholds for minimum_inside_bars and range multiplier remain undefined due to signal ambiguity and lack of multi-bar pattern indicators.
